title: InFGG's 3D+
description: If you hate shields taking all of your screen, or hate that fire covers even more? Or maybe you have some difficulty seeing those ores and would like to have 3D glowing ones instead? Well then this is perfect for you, add this to your blocky experience now
body:
- **Why sould I download this?**

> Because **I made** this recource pack mostly for **myself**, and I play with it everytime since I added the things I thought were missing in Minecraft. 

# Changes this pack makes
- **3D ores** (They glow if possible!)
- **Optimised EVERYTHING** (I did)
- **Low fire and Shield** (For all the visibility)

## Work In Progress - below!
- **Cool tools** | [Click here for em!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cyber-blades-3d/changelog)
  
- **Modded Ores**

### Updates coming!
> I do have time, but I sleep most of the day o_O
